title: PM Kisan Samman Nidhi
description: Direct income support to all farmers with cultivable land
reference_text: Official source: PM Kisan portal; Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare

title: Pradhan Mantri Mudra Loan Yojana
description: Loans up to ₹10 lakh for non-collateral based micro enterprises
eligibility: Entrepreneurs with new or existing micro enterprises
reference_text: Official source: MUDRA portal; Ministry of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises

title: Pradhan Mantri Scholarship Scheme
description: Scholarship for wards of freedom fighters
eligibility: Students whose parents were freedom fighters
reference_text: Official source: Scholarships portal; Ministry of Education

title: National Apprenticeship Promotion Scheme
description: Vocational training and apprenticeships for youth
reference_text: Official source: PMKVY portal; Ministry of Skill Development and Entrepreneurship

title: e-Shram Registration
description: Social security coverage for unorganized workers
benefits: Access to multiple welfare schemes and insurance
eligibility: Unorganized workers and informal sector employees
reference_text: Official source: e-Shram portal; Ministry of Labour and Employment

title: Ayushman Bharat - PMJAY
description: Health insurance coverage for eligible families
benefits: ₹5 lakh health insurance coverage per family per year
eligibility: Families below poverty line and target households
reference_text: Official source: myScheme portal; Ministry of Labour and Employment

title: Telangana Rythu Bandhu
description: Agricultural investment support scheme for farmers in Telangana
benefits: ₹5,000 per acre per season as investment support
eligibility: Farmers with cultivable land in Telangana
reference_text: Official source: Telangana Government website; Department of Agriculture

title: Telangana Unemployment Allowance
description: Financial assistance for unemployed youth in Telangana
reference_text: Official source: Telangana Government website; Department of Employment

title: PM Shri Scheme
description: Excellence in education through school development
reference_text: Official source: myScheme portal; Ministry of Education

title: Sukanya Samriddhi Yojana
description: Savings scheme for the girl child
benefits: High interest rates and tax benefits
reference_text: Official source: myScheme portal; Ministry of Women and Child Development

title: PM-YASHASVI
reference_text: Official source: Scholarships portal; Ministry of Education

title: National Career Service (NCS)
description: Employment guidance and job placement services
reference_text: Official source: myScheme portal; Ministry of Labour and Employment

title: Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana
description: Affordable housing for economically weaker sections
benefits: Affordable housing units and subsidy on loans
eligibility: Families from EWS and LIG categories
reference_text: Official source: myScheme portal; Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs

title: National Health Mission
benefits: Improved healthcare services and disease prevention
reference_text: Official source: myScheme portal; Ministry of Health and Family Welfare

title: Telangana Merit-cum-Means Scholarship
description: Scholarship for meritorious students from low-income families
eligibility: Students with merit and low family income in Telangana
reference_text: Official source: Telangana Government website; Department of Education
